title: ESIC – Faculty and Senior Residents – 64 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 64 Faculty and Senior Residents Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College Hospital Hyderabad (ESIC) invites applications for 64 posts of Faculty and Senior Residents from candidates having qualifications as per Medical Institutions. The walk-in interview process will be conducted from 20 May 2026 to 28 May 2026 Eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview.

age_limit.age_details: Faculty: Max 69 years, Senior Resident: Max 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: As per Medical Institutions (Qualifications of Faculty) Regulations 2025 (NMC Gazette Notification dated 30-06-2025)

seo_tags: ESIC Medical College Hospital Hyderabad Professor
